title: To Lady Holland. On Napoleon's Legacy Op A Snuff-Box.
content:
Gift of the Hero, on his dying day,
        To her, whose pity watched, for ever nigh;
    Oh! could he see the proud, the happy ray,
        This relic lights up on her generous eye,
    Sighing, he'd feel how easy 'tis to pay
        A friendship all his kingdoms could not buy.

    Paris, July, 1821
meaning: About: Thomas Moore was an Irish poet, singer, songwriter, and entertainer, now best remembered for the lyrics of "The Minstrel Boy" and the "The Last Rose of Summer".
